runTitle: Vercel Production AI Ops B4/B5 Submit Boundary Retest - v8.11.117
coveredSurfaces: AI ops command guidance B4/B5 retest after semantic submit form fix
production DOM/network diagnostic for clarification interception

expertAssessments.rationale: B4/B5 still produced no visible answer in v8.11.117 targeted QA, but direct DOM diagnostic showed the semantic form exists and B4 is intercepted by clarification UI.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Bypass clarification for concrete operations command/procedure questions, then retest B4/B5.

expertAssessments.rationale: The prior ancestor::form selector issue is resolved; the remaining failure is product clarification state preventing network dispatch.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add clarification-generator regression tests for B4/B5 command guidance prompts.

expertAssessments.rationale: Nginx/NFS operational command questions are valid incident-response prompts and should route directly to command guidance.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Ensure Nginx/NFS direct command catalog response reaches production stream after clarification bypass.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after v8.11.117 release and B4/B5 retest; effective usage 4.7045 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 4263.

artifacts.label: AI ops B4/B5 v8.11.117 raw results
artifacts.note: B4/B5 scenario result JSON captured after v8.11.117 production deploy; form boundary fixed but clarification dialog intercepted B4 before AI request.

completedImprovements.title: AI chat input exposes a semantic submit form for UI and QA automation
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.11.117 direct DOM diagnostic confirmed textarea.closest(form), form aria-label=AI 질문 전송, submit button present and enabled before B4 send.
completedImprovements.note: The remaining no-request failure is caused by clarification interception, not missing form semantics.

pendingImprovements.title: Operations command guidance prompts are intercepted by clarification dialog before AI request dispatch
pendingImprovements.evidence: v8.11.117 B4 direct DOM diagnostic: form exists, send button enabled, click opens clarification action (건너뛰고 바로 실행), and no /api/ai/supervisor or /api/ai/jobs request is emitted.
pendingImprovements.note: This narrows the previous submit/stream boundary issue to clarification-generator behavior for concrete command guidance prompts.

pendingImprovements.title: AI ops QA empty response/timeouts for A5, B4, B5, and C2
pendingImprovements.evidence: B4/B5 still timed out without visible answer in v8.11.117 command retest; A5/C2 remain unresolved from QA-20260509-0429.
pendingImprovements.note: B4 is now known to be clarification-intercepted before request dispatch; B5 needs retest after clarification bypass.

pendingImprovements.title: HAProxy service context answer omits CPU/backend distribution detail
pendingImprovements.evidence: A1 remained WARN in QA-20260509-0429 and was not retested in this command-only run.
pendingImprovements.note: Tracking as blocking for the active AI ops QA closure task, not as a global release blocker.
